programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny trabaja con el Rey del río para asegurarse el paso por el bosque del Prilgrim. La Viuda se enfrenta a un motín de las tropas que están descontentas.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny y Bajie llegan al fuerte del Pilgrim y se enfrentan a un M.K. enojado. La Viuda enlista a Gaius. Moon y Lydia reúnen a las tropas.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny i Bajie se enfrentan a Pilgrim, que les cuenta su plan mortal para los Badlands. La Viuda encuentra elementos en común con el Amo.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Pilgrim lidera la cacería del casi herido a muerte Sunny. La Viuda se enfrenta a sus demonios interiores en un intento de restaurar el Don.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny y Nix buscan información que podría destruir a Pilgrim. La Viuda y Bajie se asocian con el Amo. M.K. conduce a Pilgrim a una gran fuente de poder.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: La Viuda y el Barón Chau finalmente se enfrentan. M.K. y Pilgrim hacen crecer sus fuerzas en el Monasterio. Sunny y Bajie descubren a un nuevo enemigo, el Loto Negro.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny descubre que una figura importante de su pasado está trabajando con el Loto Negro. La Viuda, Gaius y Tilda le ponen fin a la sangrienta guerra civil.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny, Bajie y Kannin regresan a los Badlands. La Viuda hace una jugada arriesgada contra Pilgrim, poniendo a Cressida y a Lydia en el fuego cruzado.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny, Bajie y Gaius buscan a un aliado improbable en la lucha contra Pilgrim. Cressida tiene una revelación perturbadora. La Viuda se cuestiona el futuro.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny, la Viuda y Bajie lideran la carga contra Pilgrim, mientras él intenta obtener el control definitivo de los Badlands. M.K. busca vengarse de la Viuda.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: El Clipper más mortífero de los Badlands, Sunny, rescata a un muchacho misterioso, MK, que alberga un oscuro secreto, pero además puede que sepa cómo salir de las Badlands.

programme.title: Into the Badlands
programme.desc: MK encuentra refugio en un lugar inesperado y peligroso, mientras que la lealtad de Sunny se pone a prueba cuando Quinn intenta obligarlo a cometer un acto incalificable.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El examen termina y Fernanda se mantiene en la casa. Chile escucha el plan de las rechazadas y las delata. Una maestra de baile pone en su lugar a Mane y a Karime. En un restaurante se desata una batalla campal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Después de enfrentar a Mane, Dania toma una decisión importante. Los Shore reciben una clase de banda donde nace oficialmente el corrido del “Verga muerta”. Jawy habla con Fernanda y Mane está decidida a dejar sola en la casa a Dania.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Xavier y Pepe se enfrentan nuevamente. Un grupo de brujas llega a la casa y no todos quedan contentos con sus premoniciones. En la noche de noche de chicas, Dania le pide una disculpa a Mane y su reacción deja a varios sin palabras.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore se preguntan sobre el paradero de Dania. Chile y Diana tienen una cita romántica. Karime y Mane terminan en el hospital. Pepe y Ramiro reciben una llamada que cambia sus planes y los Shore se alistan para el carnaval.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shore llegan el carnaval. Karime y Potro tienen un momento de mucha intimidad. Un hipnotizador llega a la casa. Nacha tiene sospechas y decide hacerse una prueba de embarazo y una nueva integrante llega a las vacaciones.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Karime le hacen un amarre a sus amados y Nacha explota contra Jey. Potro sorprende a Isa besando a Chile y se molesta. Mane se entera de que Potro está hablando mal de Jawy y toma cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La situación entre Jawy y Potro es cada vez más tensa. Las nuevas se lanzan topless de la tirolesa. Nacha confronta a Isa, mientras que Jawy decide que la playa es el lugar perfecto para aclarar las cosas con Potro.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Talía llega de sorpresa y los lleva de fiesta. Nacha va al hospital. Chile por fin corona con Isa. Los Shores tienen una sesión con Silvia Olmedo; Karime vuelve con Ramiro y trae ganas de trío. Entre Fer e Isa hay pleito de celos por Chile.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores se preparan para el fin de la aventura en Mazatlán. Los invitados llegan a celebrar la fiesta final. Potro y Tadeo aparecen cuando ya está el pleno desmadre y un incidente entre las mujeres de Chile está a punto de explotar.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final termina en pleito entre el harén de Chile. Mane le prepara a Jawy una ceremonia sorpresa para ratificar su amor. Los Shores se van de la casa, pero Karime y Potro dejan lo mejor para el final.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienzan para los Shore y en esta ocasión, Acapulco será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta continua y el capitán desata la primera crisis en la casa. La tensión entre Isa y Fernanda crece con un descenlace inesperado y la llegada de Nacha sorprende a todos en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El boss aparece por primera vez. Los Shores descubren que la casa tiene un antro. La relación entre Alba y Fer se hace más fuerte mientras que Nacha le deja saber a Jacky que se le hace una falsa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El capitán regresa a la casa Shore. Un viaje en Catamarán genera un enfrentamiento entre Alba y Chile, mientras que a Fernanda le dañan una noche de pasión y Nacha explota contra Jacky.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The romance between Jawy and Danik is about to take a turn that she did not expect. She will be accused of being something she never imagined and, of course, Mane is involved.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch receives a mysterious package his father had put together before he died. Mitch and his father never saw eye-to-eye, but this gift impacts Mitch more than he ever thought possible. Logan visits a hypnotist to deal with a past trauma.

programme.desc: Andy, an old friend of Mitch, visits Baywatch to complete four days of lifeguard service in order to remain on the active roster. But Andy's strong-arm tactics do not sit well with the other lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When testing out a new flying machine, Mitch spots a makeshift raft with a stranded woman in it. Mitch must help the Chinese woman find her sister. Back at headquarters, Matt and Garner deal with a beach robbery scam.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Jenaye posted an emotional video online about uncovering her husband James's infidelity she never imagined it would go viral. Discovering James slept with his hairstylist on their fifth anniversary, Jenaye says divorce might be the best option.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 1992, 17-year-old Shawna was robbed while at work. Jerrie, 14, held her at gunpoint demanding money: the gun went off, destroying Shawna's jaw. Shawna, now 39, and Jerrie, out of prison, meet on Dr. Phil’s stage for the first time since the shooting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie's husband, Brian, was in a tragic work accident, falling from a 68-foot crane. Paralyzed from the knees down, she says Brian treats her & son Jacob, 13, like slaves not family. Their marriage has changed; Brian says it's too painful to even move.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: On Facebook, unexpected things happen, like reuniting with a loved one or being fired after posting an inappropriate photograph. It can also be a lifesaver, offering a human connection when all seems lost. Dr. Phil delves into a story that made headlines.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meet 15-year-old Marie who says she is now pregnant after running away three times. Dr. Phil confronts Marie about a prenatal regimen, her plan and ensuing drama over a pregnancy test request. Dr. Phil and the family discuss pregnancy test results. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Monet Monico, 19, was fast becoming an acting & singing sensation, but just 2 years later, her family says the Hollywood hopeful has become a homeless heroin addict. Facing her family for the first time in 6 months, will Monet accept help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Melissa and her mother, Michelle, who say time is running out for 14-year-old Destoni. Melissa says her daughter’s outrageous behavior will land her in jail, or even worse, get her killed. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you imagine getting an inheritance, you might assume all your financial problems would be solved. But can the money be more trouble than it's worth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany wrote to Dr. Phil devastated to discover that her boyfriend, the man she loves & with whom she is having a baby, leads a double life. But Dr. Phil discovered that Brittany was leaving out important details. What his team uncovered is shocking!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Richard says his 6-yr marriage to Kelli ended due to her obsession with "stuff"! The couple, divorced now 12 yrs, is considering re-marriage but only if Kelli stops hoarding. You won't believe what producers saw & found when the home was tested for mold.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heroin use among America's youth is plaguing some of the most prestigious & safest suburban towns. Dr. Phil sheds light on Simi Valley, CA, where residents are fighting a heroin epidemic. Dr. Phil talks to teens., parents & meets with Mayor Bob Huber.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Gypsy Willis, a former mistress of a Utah doctor convicted in the 2007 murder of his wife, speaks out about the case & controversies that surround her. Why did she move into MacNeill's home 9 days after his wife's death? Does Gypsy feel he was wronged?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Calah Waskow, 15, made national news when allegedly abducted by her friend's 37-year-old dad. Issuing an Amber Alert, Calah was found five days later. What happened to her? Did she have a secret relationship with the older man? Calah tells her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jessica says mom Patricia says she is defying odds becoming a record-setting weight lifter while simultaneously battling Stage 3 brain cancer. Jessica insists her mom isn't sick at all & she is lying about her health to gain sympathy. Emotions run high!

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: Among "historical" impersonations are Cardinal Richelieu as Petula Clark and Julius Caesar as Eddie Waring. Also: a police fairy tale; a vegetarian restaurant's menu, featuring a naked man with an apple in his mouth.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: A sketch about the Ministry of Silly Walks. Also: a British minister- attired in a pink tulle dress- talks about housing; 30 gas company workers investigate the installation of a stove; a giant hedgehog wanders London.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Asim Chaudhry gets busy with some drainpipes, Tim Vine gets stuck in a tunnel and Alex Horne suffers a sharp telling off from his Taskmaster, Greg Davies.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The Taskmaster, Greg Davies, makes more carefully considered judgements as the five competitors wrestle with snow globes, rubber ducks and wooden spoons.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Archie Hahn, Josie Lawrence, Tony Slattery and John Sessions feature in this comedy improvisation show.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Clive Evans visits his dad with some news to tell him, but the conversation takes a strange twist.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Edward Lawrence comes to The Grand to find Esmee: forty years ago, they were deeply in love but were forced to part; he's now a wealthy widower and wants to marry her.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Esmee interviews girls for the club. Many pay protection to Scott, a vicious pimp who, to put her off, smashes up Esmee's room, injuring Kate.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: A face from the past brings Erica to question her future in Cardale. The arrival of Gary's brother brings problems for Chloe and James. Alice has an interesting present for Andrew and Kirsty.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Andrew goes behind Will's back on a highly sensitive case. Will they still be able to work together? Meanwhile, love is finally in the air for Will when he and Kate share their first kiss.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: It's decision time for Will when he has to choose between Andrew and Erica to make partner. Meanwhile, Andrew and Kirsty discuss starting a family and Will meets Kate's son.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Andrew and Kirsty continue down a bad path, forcing Kirsty to make a life-changing decision. Russ causes panic amongst the staff when he collapses at the annual ball.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Former surgeon Dr Martin Ellingham arrives in the sleepy Cornish hamlet of Portwenn, replacing the former GP who has died.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's surgery officially opens for business, but patients continue to treat it as a drop-in cafe.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: When an epidemic of diarrhea strikes the village, the doctor takes immediate action. This, however, does not go down well with the population.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The doctor pays a visit to the forester, who apparently shares his shack with a giant squirrel. Little Peter Cronk gets into trouble over some nest boxes.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: With John out of the way, the staff fear redundancies as Marcus considers cost-cutting measures.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Patriota herido
programme.desc: Cuando el asesinato de un compañero conmociona al equipo, Gibbs descubre un sorprendente vínculo con el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Regla 51
programme.desc: Gibbs se dirige a México para enfrentarse a sus demonios y tomar una decisión sorprendente, en el final de la séptima temporada de NCIS.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Interferencia extranjera
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen con dos agentes rusos para buscar a un peligroso hombre ruso que ingresó a EE. UU. con una visa diplomática.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La delgada línea azul
programme.desc: Cuando Danny intercepta un envío de varios millones de dólares que estaba destinado a un cártel de drogas en México, se convierte en un blanco cuando ellos regresan en busca de venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC viaja a Rapid City después de que dos víctimas masculinas se descubren muertas por un ritual. Reid continúa lamentando la muerte de Maeve.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Patriota herido
programme.desc: Cuando el asesinato de un compañero conmociona al equipo, Gibbs descubre un sorprendente vínculo con el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Regla 51
programme.desc: Gibbs se dirige a México para enfrentarse a sus demonios y tomar una decisión sorprendente, en el final de la séptima temporada de NCIS.

programme.desc: Steve Austin is bringing out eight of the fiercest women to ever step foot on the ranch to battle through The Drain, Death Grip and The Octagon. The last woman standing will earn the right to take on Steve's new Skullbuster and a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Things are heating up on the ranch as Steve Austin brings out eight more elite athletes to go head to head in Rip Off 2.0, Hoisted and Tire Change.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight tough-as-nails women to the ranch to take on Rip Off 2.0, Hoisted and Tire Change. At the end of the day, only one will be left standing.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight new badasses descend on Steve Austin's ranch to battle it out in Trench Warfare, Stress Test and Boulder Press.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight elite female athletes have accepted Steve Austin's invitation to take on Trench Warfare 2.0, Stress Test and Boulder Press.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin has rounded up eight of the best military athletes in the country to battle it out on the ranch in Drag Race, The Wake, and Pile Drive.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin continues to bring the best athletes in the world to his ranch as eight elite women lay it on the line in Drag Race, The Wake and Pile Drive.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: The big boys take their turn on Steve Austin's ranch to battle it out in Summit, Death Grip and The Peak. It will all come down to the pit, with only one man left standing to take his shot at the Skullbuster for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight intense female athletes come to the ranch to compete in Summit, Death Grip and The Peak. They will do whatever it takes to earn the right to take on Steve Austin's Skullbuster and win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites back former bracket champions and competitors they took out along the way who are back for revenge. But it won't be easy as they have to fight through Trench Warfare and Chain Gang.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin welcomes back eight of the toughest runners up to ever compete on the ranch for a second shot at glory. They'll battle it out in The Drain and The Octagon before two of them get a chance at the Skullbuster and $25,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites back sixteen of his favorite competitors for a special Co-Ed Broken Skull Challenge, where they will take on brand new challenges The Monster and Block Party.

programme.desc: Twenty- four wild Southerners descend on a picturesque lakehouse in Georgia with $100,000 reasons to win big. But, only one team will split the payday.

programme.title: The Redemption Project
programme.desc: Aired 06/16/2019. Mario Gonzalez-Tello was killed when he tried to stop a robbery. For over a decade, his sons have been haunted by questions about what happened that night.

programme.title: Amanpour: Sex and Love Around the World
programme.desc: Aired 04/07/2018. Christiane Amanpour heads to the Carnal Capital of Europe to see how residents in Berlin crack the code on love, sex, and intimacy.

programme.title: Amanpour: Sex and Love Around the World
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2018. Christiane Amanpour goes to Shanghai to explore how societal constraints of tradition, family and state influence personal identity and sexual relationships.

programme.title: Amanpour: Sex and Love Around the World
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2018. Christiane Amanpour heads to Accra to see how Ghanaian women are reclaiming their own sexual and personal space.

programme.title: United Shades of America

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police search for a passenger who fled from a traffic stop, a driver not wearing a seatbelt finds himself in more trouble, and detectives respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An injured suspect spots his window of opportunity, a man tries to order officers around who caught him with unsavory items, and detectives catch someone in a sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A brokenhearted man sends deputies on a dangerous pursuit through town, officers uncover a weapon during a traffic stop, and a woman is detained for driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects fleeing from a stolen vehicle. A drunk driver is pulled over after a brief chase. Officers receive a call for help from a juvenile about an attempted break-in.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends in a foot chase. Stolen property is found in a suspect’s car during a traffic stop. An altercation ends with a brick being tossed at a victim’s car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is accused of murdering a famous Vegas gangster, and even he is uncertain of his guilt or innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Gil Grissom is the supervisor of the graveyard shift of Las Vegas' elite crime scene investigators. Holly Gribbs, fresh out of the academy, joins the team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man is killed after winning a fortune and then dumping his girlfriend. So, Grissom, Nick, and newcomer to the CSI team, Sara Sidle, investigate this one.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Sara search for a kidnapped woman and find more than they expected. Catherine and Warrick investigate the hit-and-run death of a little girl.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate when a leg is found severed from a body in a lake. Meanwhile, Sara and Nick investigate a fraternity pledging gone terribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick take the case of a young man who is found naked in the desert without an obvious cause of death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine violates department protocol when she takes the case of a rape accusation against her ex-husband. Warrick and Sara search for the missing bullet that will either exonerate or indict a cop for murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a teenager and her sister are the sole survivors of the gruesome murder of four members of one family in a quiet suburban neighborhood, Grissom and his entire team investigate the crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Royce Harmon was murdered 3 months ago in a scene staged to look like a suicide. Now another murder has taken place. Whoever the killer is he has a thorough knowledge of forensics, he purposefully has left evidence, and has baffled Grissom and his team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the death of a first class passenger on a flight to Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate a bug riddled body found in the desert. Warrick and Catherine look into the theft of some valuable art.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick y Sara buscan a una mujer secuestrada y encuentran más de lo que esperaban. Catherine y Warrick investigan la muerte por atropello con fuga de una niña.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Catherine investigan la aparición de una pierna cortada de un cuerpo en un lago. Mientras tanto, Sara y Nick investigan un juramento de fraternidad que ha salido terriblemente mal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Warrick toman el caso de un joven que es descubierto desnudo en el desierto sin una causa obvia de muerte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine viola el protocolo del departamento cuando acepta el caso de una acusación de violación contra su exmarido. Warrick y Sara buscan la bala perdida que exonerará o acusará a un policía de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una adolescente y su hermana son las únicas supervivientes del espantoso asesinato de cuatro miembros de una familia en un tranquilo barrio suburbano, Grissom y todo su equipo investigan el crimen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Royce Harmon fue asesinado hace 3 meses en una escena montada para que pareciera un suicidio. Ahora se ha producido otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte de un pasajero de primera clase en un vuelo a Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara investigan un cuerpo plagado de bichos encontrado en el desierto. Warrick y Catherine investigan el robo de unas valiosas obras de arte.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: El barón del terror

programme.title: Días de trueno

programme.title: ¿A quién ama Gilbert Grape?
programme.desc: Ocuparse de Arnie es una tarea que puede ser bastante demandante para Gilbert, al menos mientras trabaja en la tienda local.

programme.title: Descubriendo el país de nunca jamás

programme.title: Tan distinto como yo
programme.desc: Del éxito de ventas del NY Times llega una historia inspiradora y verdadera sobre dos hombres de orígenes radicalmente opuestos, que desarrollan un sorprendente vínculo que los llevará al viaje más notable de sus vidas y forjará una amistad eterna.

programme.title: El último castillo
programme.desc: Sus servicios al país lo hicieron un héroe pero un error lo convirtió en prisionero. Para el General Eugene Irwin (Robert Redford) es solo cuestión de cumplir su sentencia, hasta que descubre que otros presos están siendo asesinados.

programme.title: Bailando con lobos
programme.desc: Enviado para proteger un puesto fronterizo de Estados Unidos, el teniente John Dunbar se hace amigo de aquellos que él pensaba que tenía que temerle, los indios Sioux.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica

programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio
programme.desc: Una empleada de una tintorería fue violada y asesinada en la tienda. La policía recurrió a la ciencia forense en busca de las respuestas que necesitaban.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Mientras estaba de vacaciones en California, Earl Morris se entera de que su esposa ha desaparecido de su casa en Arizona. La búsqueda de Ruby Morris involucra a decenas de investigadores y científicos – incluyendo también a la Guardia Costera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante siete años, un trío de hombres robó un banco tras otro. Siempre se escapaban antes de que llegara la policía y no dejaban pruebas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la escena de un asesinato horrible, el asesino se esforzó mucho para poder borrar sus huellas dactilares y oscurecer las huellas de zapatos que dejó cuando arrastraba los rastros de sangre en el piso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Avis Banks y su hijo no nacido fueron brutalmente asesinados. El cuerpo fue descubierto por su prometido Keyon Pittman. La policía se enteró de que Pittman estaba teniendo aventuras con otras mujeres y se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Impresiones fuertes
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de la Fuerza Aérea fue encontrada muerta en su cama con una bolsa plástica de lavandería cerca de su rostro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las primeras horas de la mañana, justo antes de Navidad, una estudiante universitaria fue secuestrada del estacionamiento de su departamento. Su cuerpo fue encontrado más tarde ese día. Ella había sido agredida sexualmente y fue disparada a quemarropa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nadie en una tranquila comunidad residencial vio nada inusual el día en que uno de sus vecinos fue brutalmente atacado y asesinado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La hija de Paul Gruber sospechaba que algo malo estaba ocurriendo cuando recibió unas tarjetas de regalo enviadas de parte de su padre, pero escritas con la letra de una persona extraña.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las cámaras de seguridad en un casino rastrearon los movimientos de una joven poco antes de que desapareciera. Nunca se le volvió a ver, pero a través de la evidencia que dejó, pudo decírsele a los investigadores qué le sucedió y quién fue el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los excursionistas cerca de Anchorage, Alaska, descubrieron un cuerpo envuelto en sábanas con bordes de costura naranja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de un día de pesca en un tranquilo pueblo de Suiza, un adolescente no regresa a casa como se planeó. La investigación revela algunas evidencias microscópicas importantes en el agua cerca de donde fue visto por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Destinado a la cárcel
programme.desc: Una mujer es encontrada muerta en un barranco, pero las fuertes tormentas habían arrastrado pruebas cruciales de la escena del crimen. En dos ocasiones, el rastro se estancó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With one week until the start of the season, Kelli and Judy make a tough cut, the show group performs for the first time, and Charlotte Jones Anderson judges rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To make their final cut, Kelli and her team try to find one hopeful of the remaining 37 who isn't ready to perform at the Cowboys' home opener.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Susan Woods doesn't show up for work, she is soon discovered dead in her bathtub; as police search for answers, they find a trail of victims.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.desc: A random post on a social networking site changes everything about a case that put two brothers in prison for more that two decades.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Police bodycams capture officers rushing to Amy Allan's house after her husband called 911 to claim she'd taken her own life; investigators delve into forensic evidence and mobile data to solve the crime.

programme.desc: Just like last season, Flav has invited a special guest from his past to help give him input on his selection of ladies.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Boxin' Each Other Out
programme.desc: The five girls left want the inside scoop, so he puts all five of the girls in the parlor with a ballot box and pictures of themselves.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Steppin' Out Flav Style
programme.desc: Four girls are left and it's time to go on a little trip. Flav takes two girls down to the shore for a day of sailing with his ladies as crew. Then to the luxurious Queen Mary for an overnight.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Oh No She Didn't! (Clip Show)
programme.desc: A lot of incredible stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls' arrived.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has got her whole life mapped out. She plans on being accepted into the marketing program at the best university in Canada.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: JT has got his license. He’s got a steady girlfriend in Liberty, who happens to be Student Council President. So why is he feeling anything but a “man”? Because Liberty’s in control.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After all the craziness of last year, Craig has one overriding goal: no drama. He’s focused on his friends, his family, his studies, and his band – a reconstituted Downtown Sasquatch but no Spinner - a new addition is rocking the drum-kit…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After proving he’s still got talent on the hardwood, Jimmy is invited to try out for the Wheelchair Basketball Association’s Junior Team. It’s Jimmy’s second chance at athletic stardom, and an opportunity to make his father proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Liberty’s pregnancy enters its sixth month, she and JT are forced to face reality: even though no longer a couple, they have to deal with the pregnancy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, JT has stolen drugs from the pharmacy… He becomes entangled in a web between his boss, the drug dealer, and the police.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Someone’s definitely interested in Marco. But as it turns out, Tim is interested in Marco, but not for the expected reason. Tim knows Marco is gay, and has been struggling with how to come out to his friends and family.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight is the premiere of “Jay and Silent Bob Go Canadian, Eh” and with many of the students and faculty on the guest list, it’s like the whole school is gripped in movie premiere fever!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. Rose's disappearance remained a mystery, until a tiny clue is found years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.desc: Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on the deck of the Constitution, ready to set sail for Europe when Lucy rushes down the gangplank for one last goodbye to Little Ricky who will be in her mother's care while she is away.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous after Ricky dances with Angela Randall, an up-and-coming British actress. She gets Ricky away from her by going to the country estate of Sir Clive Richardson, a prominent English film producer, for a fox hunt he is hosting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye."

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred Mertz, managing Ricky's European band tour, is very concerned over the expense incurred when he misrouted Ricky's band so he books second-class train passage for the overnight trip to Florence and a fourth-class hotel for their stay.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on a train for Rome when Lucy is 'discovered' by an Italian film director who offers her a role in his new picture, "Bitter Grapes".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes need to return to the United States by plane instead of ship creating problems for Lucy who has bought, among other souvenirs, a 30-pound cheese.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is opening a new night spot, the Club Babalu, and wants Bob Hope to appear at the grand opening. Lucy fears Hope won't because of her widespread reputation for causing chaos, and wants to reassure him that this time she's butting out.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: As the team works to solve a deadly shooting in Burnside, Atwater realizes he has a very personal connection to the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Ruzek reunites with an old colleague to take down a crime ring, but when things don't add up, Voight and Burgess do some investigating of their own.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: As the team works to bring down a drug ring, Voight builds trust with a new informant; however, it soon becomes clear she has a plan of her own.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: With the FBI closing in on the Roy Walton investigation, Voight and Halstead strategize a way out; after a city bus driver is shot by a passenger, the team investigates a possible abduction.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing child in what turns out to be a very complicated case; Burgess and Ruzek are in for a shock when someone from Makayla's past comes forward.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Voight employs his new informant to help solve a tricky drug trafficking case; Atwater, who once again struggles to reconcile his personal and professional life, reaches a decision.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The team works together to identify the head of the brutal Los Temidos gang; Voight dives deeper into his informant Anna Avalos' past when her undercover role is threatened.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: While out for a jog, Upton witnesses a horrible car crash and risks her own life to save the passengers; after learning more about the victims, the team must track down the man responsible for the brutal crash.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The team searches for a brutal killer with a signature modus operandi; Burgess and Ruzek double down in their fight to retain custody of Makayla.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The unit scrambles to search for one of its own who is in grave danger.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Ruzek's search for the daughter of an old family friend leads the team into a serious drug investigation; Burgess and Ruzek struggle to move on from the emotional aftermath of Makayla's abduction.

programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
